title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
